pr.title: feat(replit): admin + intelligence + minion self-test batch (16 commits, 2026-05-11)
pr.body:
A batch of 16 Replit-Agent commits that accumulated on local \`main\` while CC sessions were shipping Factory v2 Phase A+B. Pushed to a feature branch by the CC orchestrator so the work is reviewable and durable.

## ⚠️ Reviewer flags — read before merging

### 🚩 §9 violation: \`lib/shared/src/constants.ts\` is edited

Per CLAUDE.md §9, \`lib/shared/src/constants.ts\` is on the financial-engine protected surface — \"Replit Agent, other AI agents, and execute-this-plan handoffs must NOT touch this surface.\" The Replit Agent added 6 new minion-self-test scheduler constants here (\`MINION_SELF_TEST_SCHEDULER_KEY\`, \`MINION_SELF_TEST_CADENCE_PARAM_SLUG\`, \`DEFAULT_MINION_SELF_TEST_CYCLE_INTERVAL_MS\`, \`DEFAULT_MINION_SELF_TEST_MIN_CYCLE_INTERVAL_MS\`, \`DEFAULT_MINION_SELF_TEST_MAX_CYCLE_INTERVAL_MS\`, \`MINION_FINDING_TARGET_KIND\`).

**Suggested fix** (same pattern as the orchestrator §9 fix on PR #121): a shell CC follow-up commit moves these to a slides-local or jobs-local constants file (e.g., \`artifacts/api-server/src/jobs/minion-self-test-constants.ts\`) and reverts \`lib/shared/src/constants.ts\` to the \`origin/main\` state. Behavior unchanged. Should ship before merge.

### 🚩 Overlap with my plan file

\`docs/plans/2026-05-11-002-fix-coderabbit-pr117-pr118-followups-plan.md\` is in this batch. The Replit Agent caught it via auto-commit while I was authoring it during the CR-fix subagent dispatch. It should ship with PR #119 (where its implementation lives) — I'll add it there in a follow-up. **If PR #119 merges first**, the merge here should be conflict-free (identical content); **if this PR merges first**, PR #119 will need to rebase.

### 🚩 \`replit.md\` touched without \`CLAUDE.md\` harmonization

CLAUDE.md "Memory-file harmonization (mandatory shipping gate)": *if you touch \`replit.md\`, sync \`CLAUDE.md\`*. The Replit Agent edited \`replit.md\` without harmonizing the CC counterpart. Review the \`replit.md\` changes and mirror them to \`CLAUDE.md\` before merge if they're shared sections.

### 🟢 New DB migrations (0051 + 0052) — looked safe on cursory inspection

- \`lib/db/migrations/0051_minion_self_test_runs.sql\` + \`artifacts/api-server/migrations/0051_minion_self_test_runs.sql\` — both \`CREATE TABLE / INDEX IF NOT EXISTS\` for \`minion_self_test_runs\`. Idempotent.
- \`artifacts/api-server/migrations/0052_minion_self_test_cadence.sql\` — \`INSERT … ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING\` to seed the \`admin_resources\` cadence row. Idempotent.

Run \`pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run check:migration-guards\` before merge per CLAUDE.md §5 to confirm the api-server runtime guard side stays in sync.

### 🟢 Zero overlap with Factory v2 Phase A+B (#118/#117/U6 #120/U7 #121/CR-fix #119)

The earlier worry about overlap with PR #119 turned out to be an artifact of the diff showing files added on origin/main since the batch's branch point (U3 merge, \`9c08de2c\`). The Replit Agent did not edit any \`slides/*\` files (except the plan-file orphan above). The 16 commits are all admin UI / intelligence pages / minion roster / property-defaults moves.

## Themes

1. **Minion roster + self-test infrastructure** (Tasks #1391/#1392/#1396/#1397/#1398/#1402): new \`minion_self_test_runs\` table, scheduler job + run tracker, admin route, storage layer, periodic health verification, roster strip on admin UI, Enzo job-title clarification, Bruno removed from catalog.
2. **Agent Roster sidebar group** (#1391-adjacent): new intelligence pages (\`AgentsRosterPage\`, \`MinionsRosterPage\`, \`SpecialistsRosterPage\`), \`AgentRosterAccordion\` component, \`agent-roster\` admin route, \`agent-taxonomy\` lib helper.
3. **Property defaults reorg**: moved \`PropertyExitDefaultsCard\`, \`PropertyExpenseRatesSection\`, etc. from CompanyAssumptions tab into Admin → Steady State (\`PropertyUnderwritingTab\`).
4. **Misc cleanup**: Management Co. sidebar rename; exit-multiple loading removed from CompanyAssumptions when unused (Task #1388); data-range display/validation improvements; 3 new SKILL.md files (\`analyst-intelligence-display\`, \`front-of-app-admin-isolation\`, \`hplus-admin-nav-ia\`).

## Commit list (top of branch first)

\`\`\`
bf999d9e Task #1397 — Scheduled minion self-test loop with finding wiring
2d2a83ab feat(admin): persist minion self-test history + show roster strip (#1396)
5b4df615 Git commit prior to merge
2696f956 Task #1402: Give Enzo a clearer job title in the Minions roster
d6f7703a Task #1398: Remove Bruno from the Minions catalog
f0bb69fc Rename Management Company sidebar item to Management Co.
19b65add Task #1392: Give Minions a real verification check on the Roster
66a4e6d7 Task #1391: Show real, periodic health on the Agent Roster
3c41ce96 Improve how data ranges are displayed and validated across the application
1b3f72b2 Organize resource display and update component imports
0d052ce9 feat(intelligence): Agent Roster sidebar group with tracked health + manual probe
dfd14ac8 Git commit prior to merge
57c4cf2e Stop loading unused exit-multiple data on Company Assumptions page (task #1388)
d92eeca8 Update resource management and display rules for admin interface
74e761d7 Move Property Defaults from CompanyAssumptions tab into Admin → Steady State
78560217 Move property defaults to the admin settings section
\`\`\`

Note: \`5b4df615\` and \`dfd14ac8\` are auto-checkpoint commits from the Replit IDE ("Git commit prior to merge") — typically scaffolding-only or generated-file updates. Inspect their diffs individually if their grouping into the surrounding task matters.

## Author audit

\`git log 9c08de2c..HEAD --format='%h %ae'\` — all 16 commits authored by \`52429710-ricardocidale@users.noreply.replit.com\` (Replit Agent's noreply email, distinct from the CC \`ricardo.cidale@norfolkgroup.io\`).

🤖 PR opened by the CC orchestrator session that shipped #119/#120/#121. The work itself is the Replit Agent's; this PR exists as a reviewable surface.

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **New Features**
  * Agent roster pages for Agents, Specialists, and Minions with health overviews and on‑demand probes
  * Minion self‑test framework with scheduled runs, per‑minion history, and admin endpoints

* **UI Improvements**
  * Range badges use a range‑quality dot plus a separate “out of range” chip
  * Intelligence sidebar adds an Agent Roster group; admin sidebar label updated
  * New Exit Revenue Multiple controls in Property Underwriting

* **Refactor**
  * Property Defaults removed from Company Assumptions and consolidated into Admin → Property Underwriting

* **Documentation**
  * New contracts: front‑of‑app resource isolation, Knowledge & Resources placement, and range‑badge behavior
